name: MGIC Investment Corporation
description: MGIC Investment Corporation is the parent company of Mortgage Guaranty Insurance Corporation (MGIC), a leading provider of private mortgage insurance in the United States. Founded in 1957 and headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, the company offers products and services that protect mortgage investors from credit losses. By facilitating affordable low-down-payment mortgages, MGIC plays a critical role in the residential mortgage finance system, helping families achieve homeownership. In addition to its core insurance offerings, the company provides lenders with various underwriting, training, and risk management services to support the broader mortgage lending industry.
